elements.Text: Modern Freehold Hotel Investment opportunity with 95 bedrooms.

Situated within the popular commuter town of Camberley, which is one of the most affluent towns in Surrey, located 30 miles southwest of London. The property is located on the corner of London Road (A30) & Camberley Park Street, the main shopping area for the town.
Premier Inn Hotels Ltd is rated ‘5A1’ by Dun & Bradstreet, representing a minimum risk of business failure.
Let to Premier Inn Hotels Ltd on a 25 year lease from 25/03/12 with 15 years and 3 months left to break & 20 years and 3 months left to expiry on 24/03/2037.
Current rent passing £418,000 (£4,400 per room). Increasing to £444,372 (£4,677 per room) at next rent review March 2017.
Five yearly rent reviews linked each February to CPI index, capped at 5% per annum. 1.23% average CPI 2014 – 2017.
We are instructed to seek offers in excess of £8,325,000 (Eight Million Three Hundred & Twenty Five Thousand).
A purchase at this level reflects a net initial yield of 5.00%, assuming purchasers costs of 6.67%, subject to contract and exclusive of VAT.
A corporate sale could also be available.
Camberley is located in Surrey 30 miles (48 km) southwest of London.
The property is on the corner of Park Street & London Road (A30) which is at the rear of the Royal Military Academy at Sandhurst.
The town has excellent transport links, located 1 mile from junction 4 of the M3.
The town is serviced by Camberley Rail Station, providing regular hourly train services to Ascot (16 mins) & Guildford (46 mins), with connecting trains to London Waterloo (1hr 09 mins).

The property comprises a 95 bedroom hotel with ancillary bar and 84 cover restaurant over part ground and upper four floors. The 2012 build has a rectangular shaped steel frame on the ground and 1st floor, with timber framed sections on the 2nd to 4th floor. Externally, the ground floor has outer leaf brick facing elevations, whilst the upper floors feature an alternating render finish of Trespa clad panels, terracotta tiling and painted rendered sections. Intenally, the specification of the bedrooms is to that of Premier Inn’s brand standard.

On the ground floor of the hotel, there are four retail units which have been sold on a Long Leasehold Interest of 999 years at a peppercorn rent from 24/06/2011 under Title Number SY797418. Three units are fully let with the fourth under offer. There is a further electricity substation lease running for 99 years from 21/02/12 under Title Number SY80120.

Planning permission was granted on 07/10/2010 under planning application number 10/0537 for the erection of a part 4/5 storey building and comprises a restaurant (Use Class A3), drinking establishment (Use Class A4) and a 95 bedroom hotel (Use Class C1). Subsequent to the main planning consent, 5 further minor amendments have been submitted and granted prior to the actual construction of the hotel. We have not reviewed the planning application or associated documentation. However we have viewed the information on the Surrey Heath Planning portals which would also be available to prospective purchasers.
The site comprises of an area of 0.405 acres (1642.93 square metres).
The accommodation can be summarised as below:-
Entrance, lift lobby and stairs to the hotel reception
Reception, restaurant, café/bar, kitchen, back of house facilities, 14 bedrooms and linen store

Camberley is one of the most affluent towns in Surrey located 30 miles southwest of London. The town has an estimated catchment of 345,000 within a 10 kilometre drive and 32% of the town’s population are categorised as “Symbols of Success” (compared to the national average of 9.6%). Camberley lies within the ‘Town Ward’ of Surrey Heath and currently has a population of 33,571 (2011 census) which represents 44% of Surrey Heath’s population.

The subject property fronts the corner of London Road and Park Street. The traffic flow on London Road is in excess of 6 million vehicles annually with a weekday flow of circa 18,000 (information supplied by Council Data from April 2011 – March 2012).
The leasehold interest is held by Premier Inn Hotels Ltd on the following terms (Title Number – SY803518).
25 March 2032 (20th Year) with 12 months written notice
15.25 years to break and 20.25 years to lease expiry
Upward only Rent reviews every fifth anniversary lease.
Initial rent is index linked to CPI, each February of the term, subject to a cap of 1.05 (Maximum yearly increase is 5%).
Use of the hotel with ancillary restaurant (C1)
A copy of the lease can be provided upon request.

The rent review is calculated five yearly and reviewed to CPI but capped at 5%.  The index figure is calculated to the month immediately preceding the relevant review date which in this instance would be February.  Below is the historic schedule of index figures, with the forecast from the Office of National Statistics for February 2017 being 101.1.
Assumed Rent at March 2017 Rent Review

The unencumbered freehold is held by Hotbed Camberley PI Ltd. (Title Number – SY37020). The Ground floor retail units are sold on a Long Leasehold Interest at a peppercorn rent from 24/06/2011 for 999 years. (Title Number – SY797418).

Premier Inn Hotels Limited, is a wholly owned subsidiary of Whitbread Group PLC and offers customers with high quality budget hotels and has been voted as the UK’s top rated hotel chain by ‘Which? Recommended Provider’. Premier Inn has over 700 hotels in the UK across all major cities and towns.
Premier Inn Hotels Limited is rated ‘5A1’ by Dun & Bradstreet, representing a ‘Minimum’ risk of business failure having reported the past three year’s financial accounts:
Premier Inn Hotels Ltd do not provide trading figures for any of their hotels and as such we do not have information on accounts for this hotel.

The Camberley hotel market has seen an increase in branded and budget hotels since 2012, with Premier Inn Camberley and Travelodge Camberley both opening their doors within that year. With 3 hotels located in the town, and House of Fisher serviced apartments opening in 2013, Camberley has rivalled its neighbouring towns of Farnborough, Frimley, Sandhurst and Blackwater in terms of hotel accommodation.
*Room rates based upon a reservation on a weekday of a single occupancy double room with no breakfast included.
Comparable Premier Inn sales transactions include;
131 bed hotel pre-let on a 25 year lease. Fixed annual increases linked to compounded CPI with a 1%-4% Cap/Collar.
Refurbished 1960’s 109 bed hotel with 14 years to break. 5 yearly compounded CPI reviews 5% cap.
West Midlands 63 bed hotel. 17.5 years to break subject to 5 yearly upward only reviews to compounded CPI, capped at 5% pa.
64 bed hotel 35 year lease. Unexpired lease term of
18.9 years. 5 yearly OMV rent reviews. Public House included in lease.
15 year lease dated from 3rd November 2014 Compounded CPI linked reviews capped at 5% pa. Beefeater restaurant included in lease.
The property has an EPC rating of B and a score of 34. A copy of the EPC certificate is available upon request.
The property has been elected for VAT and the transaction will be treated as a Transfer of Going Concern.

We have been instructed to seek offers in excess of £8,325,000 (Eight Million Three Hundred & Twenty Five Thousand), on the basis of the assumed rent of £444,372 per annum. A purchase at this level reflects a net initial yield of 5.00% assuming purchasers costs of 6.67%, subject to contract and exclusive of VAT. A corporate sale could also be available. The asset is held by Camberley PI Ltd. Any SDLT savings to be shared by both parties
For further information or to arrange an inspection please contact;
